description: This file implements a React component providing a login page interface for a web application, handling user input validation, authentication via API calls, and client-side routing.

methods.name: validateEmail
methods.description: Validates the email format and presence, returning an error message or null.

methods.name: validatePassword
methods.description: Validates password presence and minimum length, returning an error message or null.

methods.name: LoginInner
methods.description: Main React component rendering the login form and handling authentication logic.

methods.name: onSubmit
methods.description: Handles form submission, validating inputs, calling login API, and redirecting upon success.
